mvw.mvw_command: python train.py -f csvs/lrm_features.csv -l csvs/lrm_metrics.csv -a rf -m rhat_min -suf avg -bw -plt -saveas plots/results_rhat_min_lrm.png -keep _ast_ dt_ var_min var_max data_size -st -tname lightspeed -cv -ignore_vi
mvw.build_command: conda create -y -p .conda-env python=3.10 && conda activate ./.conda-env && conda install -y -c conda-forge scikit-learn numpy matplotlib pandas jsonpickle nearpy treeinterpreter cleanlab
mvw.run_command: python train.py -f csvs/lrm_features.csv -l csvs/lrm_metrics.csv -a rf -m rhat_min -suf avg -bw -plt -saveas plots/results_rhat_min_lrm.png -keep _ast_ dt_ var_min var_max data_size -st -tname lightspeed -cv -ignore_vi
mvw.input_scale: Official Zenodo csv dataset; class=lrm; model type=lightspeed; threshold sweep in -plt mode
mvw.success_criteria: train exits 0, threshold/F1 logs present, plot artifact generated

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-tree RSS peak via monitor_tree.sh (captures multithread/multiprocess peaks); build/run split; real execution.

static_triage.notes: Scikit-learn random-forest training + cross-validation; no CUDA dependency in repo.

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: build: conda dependency solve/install; run: sklearn RF training + CV and threshold sweep

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 16 GB RAM / 4 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 1.2328 GB, run 14.8356 GB, disk 2.0679 GB.
